findings.description: Text contrast ratio 3.8:1 is below recommended 4.5:1 for body text
findings.suggested_fix: Darken text color or lighten background

findings.description: Image extends within 0.3 inches of slide edge (minimum 0.5 inches)
findings.suggested_fix: Resize or reposition image to respect safe margins

findings.description: Body font size 14pt differs from deck standard 16pt
findings.suggested_fix: Increase font size to 16pt for consistency
